title: Automate release
body:
Automatically generate our GitHub release.

This GitHub action is traggered on a tag push, or manually. After a the trigger, all artifacts are built, including linux, mac, and windows installers. After everything is built, the release is automatically generated on our GitHub, and an email notification is sent out.

Our old actions are marked deprecated, and now can only be triggered manually. Leave them as-is otherwise, as a backup, so we have a tried-and-tested way of generating images, just in case this new action goes wrong.

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note
is required: Enter your extended release note in the block below. If the PR
requires additional action from users switching to the new release, include the
string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
Here are the test runs from my dummy repo:

| Test | Action Run | Release |
| ----------- | ----------- | ----------- |
| RC, no notes| [Run](https://github.com/ashley-cui/podman-actions-test/actions/runs/13428724613) | [Release](https://github.com/ashley-cui/podman-actions-test/releases/tag/v5.3.0-rc1) |
| RC, release notes    | [Run](https://github.com/ashley-cui/podman-actions-test/actions/runs/13428886781) | [Release](https://github.com/ashley-cui/podman-actions-test/releases/tag/v5.3.0-rc2) |
| Release, latest | [Run](https://github.com/ashley-cui/podman-actions-test/actions/runs/13429000732) | [Release](https://github.com/ashley-cui/podman-actions-test/releases/tag/v5.3.2) |
| Release, non-latest | [Run](https://github.com/ashley-cui/podman-actions-test/actions/runs/13429197397) | [Release](https://github.com/ashley-cui/podman-actions-test/releases/tag/v5.3.0) |
| Triggered automatically by tag | [Run](https://github.com/ashley-cui/podman-actions-test/actions/runs/13429488136) | [Release](https://github.com/ashley-cui/podman-actions-test/releases/tag/v9.9.9) |
| Build-only | [Run](https://github.com/ashley-cui/podman-actions-test/actions/runs/13429199898) | ~~Release~~ |
| Release already exists | [Run](https://github.com/ashley-cui/podman-actions-test/actions/runs/13429364046) | ~~Release~~ |
| Not RC, no release notes | [Run](https://github.com/ashley-cui/podman-actions-test/actions/runs/13429448359) | ~~Release~~ |

Please feel free to also test any of the artifacts from the test runs!
I'm not much for reading GH stuff like this, but perhaps @Luap99 and @lsm5 could peek?
